mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board(boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1) VALUES(board_seq.nextval, #{categoryno}, #{memberno}, #{title}, #{content}, #{passwd}, #{word}, sysdate, #{visible}, #{file1}, #{file1saved}, #{thumb1}, #{size1})
mapper.select: SELECT boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, cnt, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1, recom FROM board ORDER BY boardno DESC
SELECT boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, cnt, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1, recom FROM board WHERE boardno = #{boardno}
SELECT boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1, cnt, recom FROM board WHERE categoryno = #{categoryno} ORDER BY boardno DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, cnt, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1, recom, nickname, categoryname, r FROM ( SELECT b.boardno, b.categoryno, b.memberno, b.title, b.content AS content, b.passwd, b.word, b.rdate, b.visible, b.cnt, b.file1, b.file1saved, b.thumb1, b.size1, b.recom, m.nickname, c.name AS categoryname, rownum AS r FROM ( SELECT * FROM board ) b JOIN member m ON b.memberno = m.memberno JOIN category c ON b.categoryno = c.categoryno
b.categoryno = #{categoryno}
AND (UPPER(b.title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(TO_CHAR(b.content)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(b.word) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%')
AND UPPER(b.title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reply r WHERE r.boardno = b.boardno AND UPPER(r.content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' AND r.blind = 0 )
AND (UPPER(b.title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(TO_CHAR(b.content)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(b.word) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%')
ORDER BY b.boardno DESC ) ) WHERE r >= #{start_num} AND r <= #{end_num}

SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM board b
WHERE categoryno = #{categoryno}
WHERE categoryno = #{categoryno}
AND ( UPPER(title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(word) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' )
AND UPPER(title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reply r WHERE r.boardno = b.boardno AND UPPER(r.content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' AND r.blind = 0 )
AND ( UPPER(title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(word) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, cnt, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1, recom, nickname, categoryname, rownum AS r FROM ( SELECT b.boardno, b.categoryno, b.memberno, b.title, b.content AS content, b.passwd, b.word, b.rdate, b.visible, b.cnt, b.file1, b.file1saved, b.thumb1, b.size1, b.recom, m.nickname, c.name AS categoryname FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.memberno = m.memberno JOIN category c ON b.categoryno = c.categoryno
(UPPER(b.title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(TO_CHAR(b.content)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(b.word) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%')
AND UPPER(b.title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reply r WHERE r.boardno = b.boardno AND UPPER(r.content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' AND r.blind = 0 )
ORDER BY b.boardno DESC ) ) WHERE r >= #{start_num} AND r <= #{end_num}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b
( UPPER(title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(word) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' )
UPPER(title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%'
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reply r WHERE r.boardno = b.boardno AND UPPER(r.content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' AND r.blind = 0 )
